materials.name: The influence of media on investment decisions. The case of bubbles
materials.snippet:
2014 — We analyzed how information in the financial press influences investment decisions and the specific case of economic bubbles.
Investors under the influence of biases like herding, authority bias and context effect consciously or subconsciously fall into the trap of media experts. They make investment decisions.

materials.name: “AI bubble” bubble bursts
materials.snippet:
Sep 30, 2025 — AI-related investment concerns in technology articles reached a high point of 7.3 on a 10-point scale in the last week of August and have since ...
The internet is awash with reports and articles from experts, media organisations and – even – sell-side research houses offering variations on the theme “Is AI a bubble?”. For a sharp analysis, take a look at our interview with leading AI expert Azeem Azhar at our recent technology conference – AI is not a bubble (yet) amid surging demand – and his original report here.
